        yieldArduino
      • yieldArduino()
  • Templates
        loop
      • loop(body)
        setup
      • setup(body)

Bindings for the core Arduino API: free functions (digital/analog I/O, time, interrupts, ...) and constants, plus the setup: / loop: templates that export the entry points the core expects (setup also runs NimMain to init the Nim runtime).

Lets

A0: uint8
A1: uint8
A2: uint8
A3: uint8
A4: uint8
A5: uint8
A6: uint8
A7: uint8
CHANGE: cint
DEFAULT: uint8
EXTERNAL: uint8
FALLING: cint
HIGH: uint8
INPUT: uint8
INPUT_PULLUP: uint8
LED_BUILTIN: uint8
LOW: uint8
LSBFIRST: uint8
MSBFIRST: uint8
NOT_A_PIN: uint8
NOT_A_PORT: uint8
NOT_AN_INTERRUPT: cint
OUTPUT: uint8
RISING: cint

Procs

proc analogRead(pin: uint8): cint {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc analogReadResolution(bits: cint) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h",
                                        ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc analogReference(mode: uint8) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc analogWrite(pin: uint8; value: cint) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc analogWriteResolution(bits: cint) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc attachInterrupt(interruptNum: uint8; userFunc: proc () {.cdecl.};
                     mode: cint) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                   tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc delay(ms: culong) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                         forbids: [].}
proc delayMicroseconds(us: cuint) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc detachInterrupt(interruptNum: uint8) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc digitalPinToInterrupt(pin: uint8): cint {.importc, header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc digitalRead(pin: uint8): cint {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                     tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc digitalWrite(pin, value: uint8) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                       tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc interrupts() {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                    forbids: [].}
proc isAlpha(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isAlphaNumeric(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                     tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isAscii(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isControl(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isDigit(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isGraph(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isHexadecimalDigit(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isLowerCase(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isPrintable(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isPunct(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isSpace(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isUpperCase(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc isWhitespace(c: cint): bool {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                   tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc makeWord(h, l: uint8): uint16 {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                     tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc makeWord(w: uint16): uint16 {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                   tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc map(x, inMin, inMax, outMin, outMax: clong): clong {.importc,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc micros(): culong {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                        forbids: [].}
proc millis(): culong {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                        forbids: [].}
proc noInterrupts() {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                      forbids: [].}
proc noTone(pin: uint8) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [],
                          forbids: [].}
proc pinMode(pin, mode: uint8) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                 tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc pulseIn(pin, state: uint8; timeout: culong = 1000000): culong {.importc,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc pulseInLong(pin, state: uint8; timeout: culong = 1000000): culong {.
    importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc random(howbig: clong): clong {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc random(howsmall, howbig: clong): clong {.importc, header: "Arduino.h",
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc randomSeed(seed: culong) {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc shiftIn(dataPin, clockPin, bitOrder: uint8): uint8 {.importc,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc shiftOut(dataPin, clockPin, bitOrder, value: uint8) {.importc,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc toAscii(c: cint): cint {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc toLowerCase(c: cint): cint {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc tone(pin: uint8; frequency: cuint; duration: culong = 0) {.importc,
    header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc toUpperCase(c: cint): cint {.importc, header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                                  tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc yieldArduino() {.importc: "yield", header: "Arduino.h", ...raises: [],
                      tags: [], forbids: [].}

Templates

template loop(body)
Template for the loop function No name mangling as Arduino expects this function 
template setup(body)
Template for the setup function No name mangling as Arduino expects this function Includes NimMain() to initialize the Nim runtime for convenience

Made with Nim. Generated: 2026-07-23 03:03:10 UTC
